zh.Melton Mowbray, Leicestershire, England,: 英國萊希斯特斯爾梅爾敦 莫布雷
zh.Kirby Bellars, Melton Mowbray, Leicester: 英國萊希斯特斯爾梅爾敦 莫布雷
zh.lifeSummary: 當Ralph De Bellers II於1305年出生在英國萊希斯特斯爾時，他的父親Ralph II Bellers of Eye Kettleby40歲，母親Sybbell de Perers38歲。他於1334年與Agatha De Bingham在英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾科比 貝拉阿斯結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1364年10月28日在英國萊希斯特斯爾梅爾敦 莫布雷享年59歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭。

zh-hans.Melton Mowbray, Leicestershire, England,: 英国萊希斯特斯爾梅爾敦 莫布雷
zh-hans.Kirby Bellars, Melton Mowbray, Leicester: 英国萊希斯特斯爾梅爾敦 莫布雷
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ralph De Bellers II于1305年出生在英国萊希斯特斯爾时，他的父亲Ralph II Bellers of Eye Kettleby40岁，母亲Sybbell de Perers38岁。他于1334年与Agatha De Bingham在英国英格兰萊希斯特斯爾科比 貝拉阿斯结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1364年10月28日在英国萊希斯特斯爾梅爾敦 莫布雷享年59岁，埋葬在英国英格兰。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Bellers
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Bellairs
meanings: English (Lincolnshire): variant of Bellars , suggesting French belle(s) aire(s) ‘lovely demeanor’.

variants.name: Bellars
meanings: (of Norman origin): apparently from Old French bélier ‘ram’, hence a nickname for someone thought to resemble a ram in some way or possibly a metonymic occupational name for a shepherd. In Northamptonshire the name attracts excrescent -s already by 1377.

nameMeanings.name: Ralph
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

variants.name: Ralf
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Ralph De Bellers II was born in 1305, in Leicestershire, England, his father, Ralph II Bellers of Eye Kettleby, was 40 and his mother, Sybbell de Perers, was 38. He married Agatha De Bingham in 1334, in Kirby Bellars, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died on 28 October 1364, in Melton Mowbray, Leicestershire, England, at the age of 59, and was buried in England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ralph De Bellers II est né en 1305, à Leicestershire, Angleterre, son père, Ralph II Bellers of Eye Kettleby, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Sybbell de Perers, avait 38 ans. Il a épousé Agatha De Bingham en 1334, à Kirby Bellars, Leicestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 28 octobre 1364, à Melton Mowbray, Leicestershire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 59 ans, et a été enterré à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ralph De Bellers II 1305 in Leicestershire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Ralph II Bellers of Eye Kettleby 40 und seine Mutter Sybbell de Perers 38. Er hat 1334 in Kirby Bellars, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom Agatha De Bingham geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 28. Oktober 1364 im Alter von 59 Jahren in Melton Mowbray, Leicestershire, England und wurde in England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ralph De Bellers II è nato il nel 1305 nel Leicestershire, England, il suo padre, Ralph II Bellers of Eye Kettleby, aveva 40 anni e il suo madre, Sybbell de Perers, aveva 38 anni. Lui sposato Agatha De Bingham nel 1334, nel Kirby Bellars, Leicestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì il 28 ottobre 1364, nel Melton Mowbray, Leicestershire, England, all'età di 59 anni, e fu sepolto a Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.Leicestershire, England: イギリスレアイセステルシュアイア
ja.Melton Mowbray, Leicestershire, England,: イギリスレアイセステルシュアイアメルトン モウブレイ
ja.Kirby Bellars, Melton Mowbray, Leicester: イギリスレアイセステルシュアイアメルトン モウブレイ
ja.Eye Kettleby, Leicestershire, England: イギリスレアイセステルシュアイア
ja.lifeSummary: Ralph De Bellers IIが1305年にイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアで生まれた時，父Ralph II Bellers of Eye Kettlebyは40歳，母Sybbell de Perersは38歳であった。1334年にイギリスイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアキルビー ベラーズでAgatha De Binghamと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1364年10月28日にイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアメルトン モウブレイで59歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Ralph De Bellers II(이)가 1305년 영국 레이스스터실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Ralph II Bellers of Eye Kettleby(은)는 40세였고, 그의 어머니 Sybbell de Perers(은)는 38세였다. 그는 1334년 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르 커비 벨라러스에서 Agatha De Bingham(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1364년 10월 28일 영국 레이스스터실르 멜턴 모우브라이에서 59세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ralph De Bellers II nasceu em 1305, em Leicestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Ralph II Bellers of Eye Kettleby, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Sybbell de Perers, tinha 38 anos. Ele casou-se com Agatha De Bingham em 1334, em Kirby Bellars, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 28 de outubro de 1364, em Melton Mowbray, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, com 59 anos, e foi sepultado em Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ralph De Bellers II родился в 1305 г. в местности лисестиршир, Англия, его отцу по имени Ralph II Bellers of Eye Kettleby было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Sybbell de Perers, 38. Он женился на женщине по имени Agatha De Bingham в 1334 г. в местности кирби белларс, лисестиршир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер 28 октября 1364 г. в местности мелтон мавбрэи, лисестиршир, Англия в возрасте 59 лет и был похоронен в местности Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Ralph De Bellers II nació en 1305, en Leicestershire, Inglaterra, su papá, Ralph II Bellers of Eye Kettleby, tenía 40 años y su mamá, Sybbell de Perers, tenía 38 años. Se casó con Agatha De Bingham en 1334, en Kirby Bellars, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió el 28 de octubre de 1364, en Melton Mowbray, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 59 años, y fue sepultado en Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
